title: selinum ostericum
intro: Selinum ostericum, also known as Angelica keiskei, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selinum ostericum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an immune system booster. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
